_comment: Canonical claims registry. When a page mentions one of these names near a year or range, validate-claims.mjs checks the cited value against this registry. ERROR on mismatch; WARN when the page softens with 'c.'. Grow this file as content grows: every hard fact that appears on more than one page belongs here.

claims.name: Lu Yu
claims.note: Tang dynasty author of the Classic of Tea

claims.name: Wuyi
claims.note: Mount Wuyi inscribed as mixed cultural/natural World Heritage

claims.name: Jingmai
claims.note: Cultural Landscape of Old Tea Forests of Jingmai Mountain inscribed

claims.name: Jin Xuan
claims.note: Taiwan Tea Experiment Station cultivar 12, released 1981
